Bash(FLASK_ENV=development venv/bin/python3 -c "
from app import create_app
app = create_app\('development'\)
print\('App creada OK'\)
with app.app_context\(\):
    from scripts.utils import Transaccion, db
    total = db.session.query\(db.func.count\(Transaccion.id\)\).scalar\(\)
    print\(f'DB OK - transacciones: {total}'\)
")

Bash(FLASK_ENV=development venv/bin/python3 -c "
from scripts.utils import _read_one_txt
from io import BytesIO

with open\('example/R1-L1-M12_101.TXT', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

df, fname = _read_one_txt\(\('R1-L1-M12_101.TXT', BytesIO\(content\)\), periodo_mes=12, periodo_ano=2024\)
print\(f'Registros: {len\(df\)}'\)
if not df.empty:
    print\(df[['cuenta_contable','nombre_cuenta','fecha','poliza','cargos','abonos']].head\(5\).to_string\(\)\)
")

Bash(FLASK_ENV=development venv/bin/python3 -c "
from app import create_app
from scripts.utils import process_files_to_database, db
from io import BytesIO

app = create_app\('development'\)
with app.app_context\(\):
    with open\('example/R1-L1-M12_101.TXT', 'rb'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    lote_id, total = process_files_to_database\(
        [\('R1-L1-M12_101.TXT', BytesIO\(content\)\)],
        'test',
        periodo_ano=2024,
    \)
    print\(f'Lote: {lote_id}'\)
    print\(f'Registros insertados: {total}'\)
")
